text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you got so many! True to their
name, they're all so cute.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say, your claw maneuvering skills are
anything but ordinary. You're like a pro!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It might be easier if I ask you to get that stuffed
spider for me... Okay, let's go give it a shot!
